display.description: Lists all of the operations supported by Microsoft App Configuration.
Registers a subscription to use Microsoft App Configuration.
Unregisters a subscription from using Microsoft App Configuration.
Get the status of an operation.
Check whether the resource name is available for use.
Check whether the resource name is available for use.

display.operation: Get Configuration Store or List Configuration Stores
display.description: Gets the properties of the specified configuration store or lists all the configuration stores under the specified resource group or subscription.
Create or update a configuration store with the specified parameters.
Deletes a configuration store.
Lists the API keys for the specified configuration store.
Regenerates of the API key's for the specified configuration store.
Lists a key-value for the specified configuration store.

display.operation: Get Configuration Store Event Grid Filter or List Configuration Store Event Grid Filters
display.description: Gets the properties of the specified configuration store event grid filter or lists all the configuration store event grid filters under the specified configuration store.

display.operation: Create or Update Configuration Store Event Grid Filter
display.description: Create or update a configuration store event grid filter with the specified parameters.

display.operation: Delete Configuration Store Event Grid Filter
display.description: Deletes a configuration store event grid filter.
Retrieve all metric definitions for Microsoft App Configuration.

metricSpecifications.name: Sanitized
metricSpecifications.displayDescription: Total number of incoming http requests.

display.description: Read all Diagnostic Settings values for a Configuration Store.
Write/Overwrite Diagnostic Settings for Microsoft App Configuration.
Retrieve all log definitions for Microsoft App Configuration.
Validate a private endpoint connection proxy under the specified configuration store.
Get a private endpoint connection proxy under the specified configuration store.

display.operation: Create or Update Private Endpoint Connection Proxy
display.description: Create or update a private endpoint connection proxy under the specified configuration store.
Delete a private endpoint connection proxy under the specified configuration store.

display.operation: Get Private Endpoint Connection or List Private Endpoint Connections
display.description: Get a private endpoint connection or list private endpoint connections under the specified configuration store.

display.operation: Approve or Reject Private Endpoint Connection
display.description: Approve or reject a private endpoint connection under the specified configuration store.
Delete a private endpoint connection under the specified configuration store.
Auto-Approve a private endpoint connection under the specified configuration store.
Lists all the private link resources under the specified configuration store.
Reads a key-value from the configuration store.
Creates or updates a key-value in the configuration store.
Deletes an existing key-value from the configuration store.
Performs an action on an existing key-value from the configuration store. This also grants the ability to read key values.
Creates or updates a key-value in the configuration store.
Deletes an existing key-value from the configuration store.

display.operation: Get Deleted Configuration Store or List Deleted Configuration Stores
display.description: Gets the properties of the specified deleted configuration store or lists all the deleted configuration stores under the specified subscription.
Purge the specified deleted configuration store.
Gets the properties of the specified replica or lists all the replicas under the specified configuration store.
Creates a replica with the specified parameters.
Deletes a replica.
Reads a snapshot from the configuration store.
Creates or updates a snapshot in the configuration store.
Modifies archival state for an existing snapshot in the configuration store.

display.operation: Get Network Security Perimeter Association Proxy or List Network Security Perimeter Association Proxies
display.description: Get the properties of the specific network security perimeter association proxy or lists all the network security perimeter association proxies under the specified configuration store.

display.operation: Create or Update Network Security Perimeter Association Proxy
display.description: Create or update a network security perimeter association proxy under the specified configuration store.

display.operation: Delete Network Security Perimeter Association Proxy
display.description: Delete a network security perimeter association proxy under the specified configuration store.

display.operation: Get Network Security Perimeter Configuration or List Network Security Perimeter Configurations
display.description: Get the properties of the specific network security perimeter configuration or lists all the network security perimeter configurations under the specified configuration store.
Reconcile a network security perimeter configuration under the specified configuration store.

display.operation: Notify Network Security Perimeter Updates Available
display.description: Receive network security perimeter update notifications.
Determines if a user is allowed to associate an Azure App Configuration with a Network Security Perimeter.
Gets the properties of experimentation or lists experimentation under the specified configuration store.
Creates experimentation with the specified parameters.
Deletes experimentation.
